## Validation

- [ ] Catalog install downloads/extracts successfully
- [ ] Manifest emits executable and preserve/user-data paths
- [ ] Managed Play syncs and launches from local cache
- [ ] Firmware/keys/internal installs push from one PC and pull to another
- [ ] Empty overrides fall back to manifest paths
